intro: Establish an account with 1 of our 3 specialty distributors. Organon does not recommend one distributor over another.
promptPayNote: A 2% prompt-pay discount is available under CuraScript SD, TheraCom, and McKesson Medical-Surgical specialty distributors for eligible customers.

items.name: CuraScript SD
items.description: Medical co-pay claims can be submitted electronically using the CuraScript Claims Portal.

items.name: TheraCom
items.description: Medical co-pay claims can be submitted electronically using the TheraCom Claims Portal.

items.name: McKesson Medical-Surgical
items.description: Medical co-pay claims can be submitted electronically using the McKesson Claims Portal.
